arts.ttl: Official: Atalanta vs. Lecce moved to Sunday after sudden death
arts.sum: The Serie A match between Atalanta and Lecce has been moved from Friday April 25...

arts.ttl: Lecce expect Atalanta match to be postponed after death of physiotherapist
arts.sum: Lecce have announced that they expect their Serie A match against Atalanta, scheduled for Friday...
